---
about:
  template: trestles
  image: img/profile_picture.png
  image-shape: round
  image-width: "360px"
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/fenditsim/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/fenditsim
    - icon: database
      text: OSF
      href: https://osf.io/8gpks/
    - icon: person vcard
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3556-4602    
---

::: justify
Welcome to my personal website!

My name is Fendi, and I am a Doctoral Researcher at Warwick Business School, University of Warwick. I work in the field of behavioural and economic science.

During my spare time I like to spend time with my family and friends, going outdoors, watching movies and anime (big fan!), [taking pictures](gallery/index.qmd), going to gym and reading books (currently aiming to read 52 books [this year](https://www.goodreads.com/user_challenges/46721122) - I read 68 books [last year](https://www.goodreads.com/user_challenges/45178311)!)
:::
